text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sometime around the middle of February, as I
walk by the station with King Halo...

text_block_list.name: High School Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look! Is that the Umamusume everyone's
been talking about? Is that King?

text_block_list.name: High School Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Are you serious?! I heard she'll take a picture with
us if we ask. I wonder if it's true.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! That depends entirely on my mood!

text_block_list.name: High School Students
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You needn't be so surprised. Especially not after I
took the trouble to address you in the first place.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse you! Since when have I been your anything?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Well? Didn't you two mention wanting a picture
a moment ago?

text_block_list.name: High School Students
text_block_list.text: Um, ah... Yes...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Right. Then I grant you the right to have your
picture taken with me. Tag the image with "King is
the best" and "Takamatsunomiya Kinen," won't
you?

text_block_list.name: High School Students
text_block_list.text: Really? Are you sure you don't mind?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, of course not. Your king is both generous and merciful!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Now, isn't this a photo you'll remember
for the rest of your lives?

text_block_list.name: High School Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, yes! It's adorbs! Thanks, King!

text_block_list.name: High School Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Please, take this friendship chocolate as a thank
you gift! We've got some for you too, mister!

text_block_list.name: High School Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Please, take this friendship chocolate as a thank
you gift! We've got some for you too, miss!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: For me? Th...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Th-thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Swept up in the moment, I also receive some
friendship chocolate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Friendship chocolate... Hehe. A couple of fans
just gave me some friendship chocolate.
choice_data_list: Yeah, they seemed to really like you.
Yeah, they seemed to really like you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well of course. Why wouldn't they?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: If I keep this up and boost my popularity, then—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Loud Paparazzi
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! I got the pic! I can already see the headline
for this juicy scoop—"Social Media Slave? The
Shallow Musings of a Wannabe Celeb!"

text_block_list.name: Elderly Passerby
text_block_list.text:
Wait, is that the legendary Umamusume
socialite? They spoke about her on the talk show
the other day...

text_block_list.name: Woman with Child
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, the one who caused a big fuss when she
suddenly changed her goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Drawn in by the paparazzi, the passersby shoot
dubious looks our way. King Halo, however...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Excuse me, Miss Paparazzi. Wait a moment,
please.

text_block_list.name: Loud Paparazzi
text_block_list.text:
What? You want copy approval or something?
You can wait until the article is published like
everyone el—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, that's all right. You're welcome to criticize my
behavior. I do use media people like you to
benefit myself, after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But you're absolutely not welcome to use the photo you just took.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If your article ends up causing trouble for those
girls who gave me chocolate... Well, let's just say I
won't let you off lightly.

text_block_list.name: Loud Paparazzi
text_block_list.text: Gulp...
choice_data_list: I'd like a word with you too.

text_block_list.name: Loud Paparazzi
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time we get back to the academy after
settling things with the paparazzi, it's already
dusk.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"Trainer Presses Paparazzi!" "Who Is the Figure
behind the Famous Young Socialite?!"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"The Value of King’s Choices to Be Tested at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm prepared to hear all sorts of opinions
expressed about my behavior, but...
choice_data_list:
You were happy getting that friendship
chocolate from your fans.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What? W-well, that's...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Of course I was happy. I mean, they were
expressing their fondness for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Why am I so awkward?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Today was tiring for both of us, wasn't it? But at least we got some sweets out of it. Let's have some tea.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I hereby give you the right to prepare
some exquisite tea for yours truly. Chop chop,
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I brew some tea for King Halo, and the tension
seems to melt from her face as she savors the
chocolate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Of course I'm happy. I mean, they were
expressing their fondness for me.
choice_data_list:
Then ignore all the other voices. Just listen to
your fans.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I know that, dummy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But yes. I'll do them the honor of treasuring such
gestures.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And I shall also do my closest fan the honor of
gratefully acknowledging their commitment.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Even so, today was exhausting. But seeing as we've been given something sweet, let's have some tea.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Today, I will grant you the right to drink some tea
that I have brewed myself. Do savor its exquisite
taste.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as King Halo prepares the tea, I catch her
glancing at the chocolate from time to time and
smiling.
